sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52567" key="ka/lesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάλεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52567.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλῆσις</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
